title: zanthoxylum obtusifolium
intro: Zanthoxylum obtusifolium, also known as the Fragrant Prickly Ash, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family that is native to Southeast Asia and the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum obtusifolium include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antiviral and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Zanthoxylum obtusifolium include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, taken as capsules, or applied topically to affected areas.
